Package com.example.myapplication

Class ScanQRUITest

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUITest
public class ScanQRUITest extends Object
The following test file was written with the guidance of Claude AI Prompt: "Write UI tests for US 01.06.01" April 2, 2026

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testNoEventId_doesNotOpenPopup()
    Without a valid eventId, the event details popup should not appear Simulates what happens when QR scan produces no result
    void
    testScanQRButton_isClickable()
    QR scan button should be clickable
    void
    testScanQRButton_isVisible()
    QR scan button should be visible on the event list screen
    void
    testValidQRScan_closeButtonDismissesPopup()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, close button should dismiss the popup Verifies the user can exit event details and return to event list
    void
    testValidQRScan_opensEventDetailsPopup()
    Simulates a valid QR scan by directly launching EventDetailsFragment with a known eventId — mirrors what scannerLauncher does after a real scan Verifies the event details popup opens correctly
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventDate()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, event date should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventDesc()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, event description should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventLocation()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, event location should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventRegEnd()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, registration end date should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventRegStart()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, registration start date should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventSpots()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, spots available should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventTitle()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, event title should be displayed
    void
    testValidQRScan_showsEventType()
    After a simulated valid QR scan, event type should be displayed

    • testScanQRButton_isVisible

      QR scan button should be clickable

    • testValidQRScan_opensEventDetailsPopup

      public void testValidQRScan_opensEventDetailsPopup()
      Simulates a valid QR scan by directly launching EventDetailsFragment with a known eventId — mirrors what scannerLauncher does after a real scan Verifies the event details popup opens correctly

    • testValidQRScan_showsEventTitle

      public void testValidQRScan_showsEventTitle()
      After a simulated valid QR scan, event title should be displayed

    • testValidQRScan_showsEventType

      After a simulated valid QR scan, event type should be displayed

      After a simulated valid QR scan, event description should be displayed

      After a simulated valid QR scan, event date should be displayed

    • testValidQRScan_showsEventRegStart

      public void testValidQRScan_showsEventRegStart()
      After a simulated valid QR scan, registration start date should be displayed

      public void testValidQRScan_showsEventRegEnd()
      After a simulated valid QR scan, registration end date should be displayed

      public void testValidQRScan_showsEventSpots()

    • testValidQRScan_closeButtonDismissesPopup

      public void testValidQRScan_closeButtonDismissesPopup()
      After a simulated valid QR scan, close button should dismiss the popup Verifies the user can exit event details and return to event list

    • testNoEventId_doesNotOpenPopup

      public void testNoEventId_doesNotOpenPopup()
      Without a valid eventId, the event details popup should not appear Simulates what happens when QR scan produces no result
